title: CT1 static tactic graph — Local target tests
description: Concrete static-graph schema for CT1 (Local target tests). It requires the complete 26-node array in fixed source order from CT1.N01 through CT1.N26, with exact node IDs, ordinals, and roles; all remaining graph data must satisfy the generic tactic specification.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for the CT1 (Local target tests) tactic specification; must equal "CT1".

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT1.N01, "Definition — target predicate T", in CT1 (Local target tests); must equal "CT1.N01".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT1.N01, "Definition — target predicate T"; must equal the integer 1.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT1.N01, "Definition — target predicate T"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT1.N02, "Definition — local test family T_family=\T_i\_i∈ I", in CT1 (Local target tests); must equal "CT1.N02".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT1.N02, "Definition — local test family T_family=\T_i\_i∈ I"; must equal the integer 2.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT1.N02, "Definition — local test family T_family=\T_i\_i∈ I"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT1.N03, "Definition — candidate witness spaces W_i(G)", in CT1 (Local target tests); must equal "CT1.N03".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT1.N03, "Definition — candidate witness spaces W_i(G)"; must equal the integer 3.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT1.N03, "Definition — candidate witness spaces W_i(G)"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT1.N04, "Lemma — bounded radius/interface; finite type index", in CT1 (Local target tests); must equal "CT1.N04".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT1.N04, "Lemma — bounded radius/interface; finite type index"; must equal the integer 4.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT1.N04, "Lemma — bounded radius/interface; finite type index"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT1.N05, "Scope candidate — no local test family — scope audit", in CT1 (Local target tests); must equal "CT1.N05".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT1.N05, "Scope candidate — no local test family — scope audit"; must equal the integer 5.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT1.N05, "Scope candidate — no local test family — scope audit"; must equal "scope_audit", meaning this node records a candidate scope obstruction for audit, not as a proved fact.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT1.N06, "Lemma — T exists iff some T_i is realized", in CT1 (Local target tests); must equal "CT1.N06".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT1.N06, "Lemma — T exists iff some T_i is realized"; must equal the integer 6.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT1.N06, "Lemma — T exists iff some T_i is realized"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT1.N07, "Repair datum — bounded witness missing from T_family", in CT1 (Local target tests); must equal "CT1.N07".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT1.N07, "Repair datum — bounded witness missing from T_family"; must equal the integer 7.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT1.N07, "Repair datum — bounded witness missing from T_family"; must equal "recovery", meaning this node records and repairs missing data or a missing supporting rule.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT1.N08, "Lemma — extend T_family by the missing witness type", in CT1 (Local target tests); must equal "CT1.N08".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT1.N08, "Lemma — extend T_family by the missing witness type"; must equal the integer 8.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT1.N08, "Lemma — extend T_family by the missing witness type"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT1.N09, "CT 1 — local target tests", in CT1 (Local target tests); must equal "CT1.N09".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT1.N09, "CT 1 — local target tests"; must equal the integer 9.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT1.N09, "CT 1 — local target tests"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT1.N10, "Dichotomy lemma — target realization vs.\ target-avoiding state"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT1.N11, "C1 — realized test gives target closure"; must equal "certificate", meaning this node is a terminal closure or contradiction certificate.
